mnemonics.title: RSA Steps
mnemonics.content: Remember: 1. Select Primes 2. Multiply n 3. Find φ(n) 4. Choose e 5. Compute d

acronyms.usage: Used in security protocols requiring small key sizes

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a doughnut shape with points connected by tangent/chord lines

analogies.analogy: Like finding a specific water molecule in a spinning hurricane
